spec.precondition: requires valid(galloc) && valid(graph) && valid_range(graph->leafs, 0, graph->n_leafs) && valid_range(graph->nodes, 0, graph->n_nodes) && valid_range(galloc->buffers, 0, galloc->n_buffers) && valid_range(galloc->leaf_allocs, 0, graph->n_leafs) && valid_range(galloc->node_allocs, 0, graph->n_nodes) && (forall i in 0..graph->n_leafs: valid(graph->leafs[i])) && (forall i in 0..graph->n_nodes: valid(graph->nodes[i]) && valid_range(graph->nodes[i]->src, 0, GGML_MAX_SRC)) && galloc->n_buffers >= 1
spec.postcondition: (ensures (result == true) ==> (forall i in 0..galloc->n_buffers: galloc->buffers[i] == null(galloc->buffers[i]) || (valid(galloc->buffers[i]) && "buffer is reset and tensors allocated")) && (result == false) ==> (galloc->n_buffers > 1 && ggml_gallocr_needs_realloc(galloc, graph))) && (result == (!ggml_gallocr_needs_realloc(galloc, graph) || (galloc->n_buffers == 1 && ggml_gallocr_reserve(galloc, graph))))
